hooks.command: prompt=$(jq -r '.user_prompt // empty'); if echo "$prompt" | grep -qiE '(create-story|dev-story|dev this story|create story|create the next story|implement the next story|code-review|review this|retrospective|retro)'; then sqlite3 ~/.claude-mem/claude-mem.db "SELECT json_object('hookSpecificOutput', json_object('hookEventName', 'UserPromptSubmit', 'additionalContext', '## claude-mem: Context for this task' || char(10) || 'Use mem-search to find relevant decisions and patterns before proceeding. Recent observations:' || char(10) || char(10) || group_concat(title || ' — ' || subtitle, char(10)))) FROM (SELECT title, subtitle FROM observations WHERE project = 'mahjong-game' ORDER BY created_at_epoch DESC LIMIT 8);" 2>/dev/null; fi
